productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Spry Black Red Sandal
description: CompositionBlack and orange sandals with adjustable straps, EVA footbed with massaging nubs, ankle strap support and rubber, multi directional outsoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washA clean and sporty footwear with adjustable straps, this pair of sandals from adidas has an ankle support strap that helps keep the feet in place comfortably. The full-length EVA massage footbed ensures your feet are never tired, while the multi directional rubber outsole helps maintain absolute support and grip. It has a toe-guard and heel guard that bends slightly upward to protect your toes and heel, and also enhance the footwear's durability. The open cuts ensure ample breathability for the feet during summer, while you can pair them with woollen socks for the colder months.
